Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer to the first cause of action for interference with easement is sustained without leave to amend; no substantive opposition filed addressing issues raised by demurrer. Demurrer to the second cause of action for inverse condemnation is overruled. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that tree roots (the subject of this complaint) are not inherently dangerous as a matter of law. City of Oroville v. Superior Court (2019) 7 Cal.5th 1091 is inapposite having addressed the inherent dangers of the sewer construction, maintenance and design at trial.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
